posts.author: meri.bunic (Meri Bunic)
posts.cookedHtml:
Description

In mobile App in Daschboard, it is not possible to add Task in calendar (widget). Support told me it seems this is currently a known limitation of the mobile app.

What are you trying to achieve

That will be great, because when you are using mobile app, we created a dschboard with calendar and this widget would be very usefull,.
